name: MIGHTY+ MEDIC
summary: The medically certified Mighty+ for patients who need documented, prescription-grade portable hardware.
description: The Mighty+ Medic is the Class IIa medical device version of Storz & Bickel's Mighty+, made in Germany to the same standard. The hardware is identical to the standard Mighty+ — hybrid convection and conduction heating, a ceramic-coated oven, SuperCharge USB-C charging and control from 40°C to 210°C — but it carries additional medical device certification. That certification is the reason to choose it: for patients who need documented hardware for insurance, prescription or clinical assurance, the Medic is the correct variant. If you do not need the paperwork, the standard Mighty+ delivers the same session for less.
